title: Evolution Mega Knight
description: replaces the totem of undying with the mega knight
body:
replaces the totem of undying with the mega knight from the Clash Royale game
which has become a meme on TikTok
![mega Knight card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a94a796300e640c73d14e8cdc427ac3b3fb0254.png)

WARNING: THE SOUND IS VERY LOUD

The Mega Knight is a Legendary card that is unlocked from the Electro Valley (Arena 11). It spawns an area-damage, ground-targeting, melee, ground troop with very high hitpoints and high damage. Upon deployment, he will deal damage to enemy units around him in a 360º area around him, and inflict knockback. If there are ground units between 3.5 and 5 tiles of him, he will stop moving and begin charging a jump attack which takes 0.9 seconds to execute, and will deal double damage, and inflict knockback. He appears as a Knight with blue eyes and black eyebrows, wears a helmet with a team-colored feather on top, maces, and huge armor, along with a gray chainmail and a team-colored belt. A Mega Knight card costs 7 Elixir to deploy.

![mega Knight random meme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/068cf038e8cc48491dafb0247f0d8529df15c14d.gif)
